category_sources: Official Cloudflare Terraform docs describe cf-terraforming for importing and generating Cloudflare Terraform state/config: https://developers.cloudflare.com/terraform/advanced-topics/import-cloudflare-resources/
source_facts.description says it facilitates terraforming existing Cloudflare resources.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and Cloudflare docs use cf-terraforming: https://github.com/cloudflare/cf-terraforming
docs_sources: Official Cloudflare developer docs include a cf-terraforming section: https://developers.cloudflare.com/terraform/advanced-topics/import-cloudflare-resources/
Official GitHub README provides tool-specific install and usage documentation: https://github.com/cloudflare/cf-terraforming
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cloudflare/cf-terraforming, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Cloudflare docs say cf-terraforming helps existing Cloudflare customers get started with Terraform: https://developers.cloudflare.com/terraform/advanced-topics/import-cloudflare-resources/
source_facts.description references Cloudflare resources and terraforming.
